meaning: 布痕瓦尔德[德意志民主共和国西南部一村庄](1937至1945年德国法西斯曾在此设立集中营,残酷屠杀了数万名反法西斯战士)
examples: In Buchenwald he met the social psychologist Ernst Federn.
I have an interest in that since the 4th armored was the division that liberated my father-in-law from Buchenwald.
Mr. and Mrs. Rosenblat appeared on “The Oprah Winfrey Show” in 1996, telling their story of meeting as children while Mr. Rosenblat was a prisoner at a subcamp of the infamous Buchenwald.
When Lewis first saw Buchenwald, he was a young man but an experienced soldier.
He was arrested by the Gestapo and later sent to the Buchenwald and Dora concentration camps.
